prompt: I want to understand the complete structure of this model — every named range, what sheet it's on, whether it has a formula or raw value, and whether there are intent notes. Give me the full picture.
assertions: Runs 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py inspect <file>' to get model structure
The inspect output lists all 20 named ranges (6 Inp_ + 14 calculations)
Identifies which named ranges are on the Assumptions sheet vs Calculations sheet
Distinguishes raw values (inputs) from formula cells (calculations)
Reports whether intent notes (comments) are present on formula cells
Presents the information in an organized, human-readable format — not raw JSON dump
